art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 has opened at HKCEC with 240 galleries from 41 countries; notable collector interest in Korean masters like Lee Bul and Kim Yun-shin.
top_stories: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 opened at HKCEC featuring 240 galleries from 41 countries.
New 'Echoes' curation and 'Zero 10' digital initiatives debut, marking significant contemporary trends.
Strong demand for works by Lee Bul and Kim Yun-shin observed among high-end collectors.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed down 3.22% at 5,460 points, hitting a two-week low following regional volatility and oil price shocks.
key_factors: Significant KOSPI drop (-3.22%) due to Iran conflict-driven oil price surges and TurboQuant concerns.
Semiconductor sector (Samsung, SK Hynix) experienced heavy downward pressure for a second consecutive day.
Retail bargain-hunting observed, but overall investor sentiment remains bearish heading into the weekend.
